title: Approval of agreement by tribunal
doc_html:
§377.8. Approval of agreement by tribunal

            A tribunal may approve an agreement resulting from a collaborative family law process.

            Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
doc_text:
§377.8.  Approval of agreement by tribunal
A tribunal may approve an agreement resulting from a collaborative family law
process.
Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
